package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.Replace(..., -1)` instead of `bytes.ReplaceAll(...)`.
type CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallModel
}

type CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceall(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesReplaceNegOneReplaceallDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    buf = bytes.Replace(buf, []byte(":"), []byte("-"), -1)
    bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall_positive := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "replace": 2, "neg": 3, "one": 4, "replaceall": 5}
    bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_positive_0
    replace_positive_1 := bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall_positive["replace"] + len(input)
    _ = replace_positive_1
    neg_positive_2 := bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall_positive["neg"] + len(input)
    _ = neg_positive_2
    one_positive_3 := bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall_positive["one"] + len(input)
    _ = one_positive_3
    replaceall_positive_4 := bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall_positive["replaceall"] + len(input)
    _ = replaceall_positive_4
    return nil
}
